headline: Why Is Cognizant (CTSH) Up 1.8% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: Cognizant (CTSH) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: How Is Adobe's Stock Performance Compared to Other Tech-Software Stocks?
summary: Adobe has underperformed the Tech-Software industry over the past year, but analysts are cautiously optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

headline: FICO Pindrop Alliance Expands AI Fraud Role In Financial Workflows
summary: FICO (NYSE:FICO) and Pindrop announced a partnership to bring AI-powered fraud detection into the FICO Platform. The agreement integrates Pindrop Protect to provide real-time, multi-signal fraud intelligence for financial institutions. The collaboration includes tools such as deepfake detection and consortium intelligence within FICO decisioning workflows. For investors watching NYSE:FICO, this partnership adds another layer to the company’s role in credit scoring and decisioning software...
